productDisplayName: Hanes Women Black Concealing Petals Wirefree Moulded Bra
description: Style NoteIf your wardrobe is full of a myriad of Tees, then this T-shirt bra from hanes is the perfect choice for you. It has unique concealing petals positioned right where you need them inside the bra cup, which prevent show through. This piece also has a built in ultra-thin padding which adds no bulk for a smooth finish that stretches and moves with you. So what are you waiting for? Go ahead.Indulge.Product DetailsBlack coloured brassiere, has moulded and padded cups, concealing petals inside, regular adjustable straps, adjustable double hook and eye closure at the back and a smooth look to be worn under tight fitting clothesMaterial and CareOuter cup, back, centre front:82% nylon, 18% spandexCup lining:100% polyester cup pad:100% polyurethane foam centre belt lining:100% nylonHand washDo not iron Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
